content.problemStatement:
You are given an undirected weighted graph it has NNN vertices and MMM edges. 

You are tasked to find the length of the shortest path duvd_{uv}duv‚Äč between each pair of vertices uuu and vvv.

TaskImplement the Floyd-Warshall Algorithm to solve the problem


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a two integers NNN and MMM, denoting the number of vertices and edges.
Next MMM lines describes the edges. i‚ąíthi-thi‚ąíth of these MMM lines contains three space-separated integers uiu_iui‚Äč, viv_ivi‚Äč and wiw_iwi‚Äč denoting there exists an edge between uiu_iui‚Äč and viv_ivi‚Äč with weight wiw_iwi‚Äč.


Output Format
Output a Matrix of N x N dimension - i‚ąíthi-thi‚ąíth  line has the distance from node iii to all the other nodes.
If there exists no path from iii to jjj output -1 instead.
